info.title: Nager.Date API Reference
info.description: The Nager.Date API is a free public service that provides reliable information about public holidays and long weekends for countries around the world. It allows developers to query national holiday dates, check whether a specific day is a public holiday, list upcoming holidays, and explore long-weekend data. By using the API, you agree to the Terms of Service.

get.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific country
get.description:
Provide a valid `ISO 3166-1 alpha-2` country code to retrieve country metadata.
The response includes commonly used and official country names, the assigned region, and if available neighboring countries based on geographical borders.

404.description: The provided country code is invalid or not recognized.

get.summary: Retrieve the complete list of all countries supported by the Nager.Date API
get.description:
This endpoint returns all countries for which public-holiday data is available.
Each entry includes the country's name and ISO code.

200.description: Successfully returns the list of supported countries.

get.summary: Retrieve all long weekends for a given country and year
get.description:
A long weekend is calculated based on public holidays that create an extended break of at least three consecutive days.
Optional bridge days-weekdays between a holiday and a weekend-can be included to identify potential extended leave opportunities.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The target year for which long-weekend data should be calculated.

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: A valid `ISO 3166-1 alpha-2` country code determining the region of interest.

parameters.name: availableBridgeDays
parameters.description: The maximum number of bridge days to include when determining long-weekend opportunities.

parameters.name: subdivisionCode
parameters.description: Narrow the calculation to a specific federal state, province, or subdivision (where supported).

200.description: Successfully returns the calculated long-weekend results for the specified country and year.

404.description: The provided country code is invalid or not recognized.

get.summary: Retrieve the list of all public holidays for the specified year and country
get.description:
This endpoint returns all officially recognized public holidays for the given country
and year. Each holiday entry includes the local and English holiday names, information
about whether the holiday applies nationally or only in specific subdivisions, and the
associated holiday type classifications.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The target year for which public holidays should be retrieved.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of public holidays.

400.description: The request was invalid. See the validation details for more information.

404.description: The provided country code is invalid or not recognized.

get.summary: Determines whether today is a public holiday in the specified country, optionally adjusted by a UTC offset
get.description:
By default, the calculation is based on the current UTC date.
You may optionally provide a timezone offset to evaluate the holiday status relative to a different local timezone.

This endpoint is optimized for simple command-line or automation workflows where only the HTTP status code is required

```
STATUSCODE=$(curl --silent --output /dev/stderr --write-out "%{http_code}" https://date.nager.at/Api/v3/IsTodayPublicHoliday/AT)
if [ $STATUSCODE -ne 200 ]; then
    # handle error
fi
```

parameters.name: countyCode
parameters.description: Optional. The subdivision code (e.g., state, province) to narrow the check.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Optional. UTC timezone offset in hours (range: -12 to +12).

204.description: Today is not a public holiday

404.description: The provided country code is invalid or not recognized.

get.summary: Retrieve all upcoming public holidays occurring within the next 365 days for a given country
get.description: The list includes only future holidays relative to the current date and is useful for forecasting, event planning, and applications that provide forward-looking holiday insights.

200.description: A list of upcoming public holidays for the next 365 days.

204.description: No upcoming holidays were found for the specified country.

get.summary: Retrieve all public holidays occurring worldwide within the next 7 days
get.description: This global endpoint aggregates upcoming holidays across all supported countries, enabling international systems to detect near-term events.

200.description: A collection of upcoming global public holidays.

get.summary: Retrieve the current version information of the Nager.Date library
get.description: This endpoint returns detailed version information about the Nager.Date implementation running on the server, including the exact NuGet package version used by the API.

commonName.description: The commonly used name of the country.

officialName.description: The official name of the country.

region.description: Geopolitical or continental region of the country.

commonName.description: The commonly used name of the country.

officialName.description: The official name of the country.

region.description: Geopolitical or continental region of the country.

borders.description: Neighboring countries based on geographical borders.

CountryInfoWithBordersDto.description: Detailed information about a country, including neighboring countries.

name.description: The common name of the country.

CountryV3Dto.description: Represents a country supported by the Nager.Date API.

startDate.description: The start date of the long weekend.

endDate.description: The end date of the long weekend.

dayCount.description: Total number of days in the long weekend.

needBridgeDay.description: Indicates whether a bridge day is required to achieve the long weekend.

bridgeDays.description: Optional bridge days that extend the weekend.

LongWeekendV3Dto.description: Represents a long weekend, including optional bridge days.

fixed.description: Indicates if this holiday occurs on the same date every year.

global.description: Indicates if this holiday applies to the entire country.

counties.description: ISO-3166-2 codes of the subdivisions where this holiday applies

launchYear.description: The year the holiday was first observed.

types.description: List of holiday types this holiday is classified under.

tags.name: Country
tags.description: Provides access to detailed country information and the list of all countries supported by the API. This includes general metadata such as country names, codes, regions, and related details.

tags.name: LongWeekend
tags.description: Covers operations for retrieving long-weekend information. These endpoints help identify extended weekends created by public holidays, including optional bridge days.

tags.name: PublicHoliday
tags.description: Includes functionality for retrieving public-holiday data, checking whether a specific day is a public holiday, and listing upcoming holidays. Supports both country-specific and worldwide holiday queries.

tags.name: Version
tags.description: Returns information about the current version of the Nager.Date API in use.
